decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_hylan-blvd-transportation-improvement-study' matches the existing registry card with the same record_id. The registry card already includes source_id '201106_hylan_slides', and the label 'Hylan Boulevard Corridor Transportation Improvement Study' is attested in record_aliases (e.g., 'project_hylan-blvd-corridor-transportation-improvement-study'). The observation already resolves to its own canonical record; no link to a different record is needed.
